2606.23626.title: DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling
2606.23626.paper_summary: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.
2606.23626.paper_summary_zh: 生成的圖像所學習的表示也能支持生成圖像的評估嗎？我們研究文本到圖像的獎勵預測，作為生成表示學習的下游任務。為此，我們引入了 DiT-Reward，它通過處理近乎乾淨的圖像潛在表示並在Transformer層之間聚合文本條件的圖像表示，將預訓練的文本到圖像擴散Transformer轉換為獎勵模型。在與 HPSv3 相同的訓練數據混合下，DiT-Reward 在所有四個評估的偏好基準上均超越 HPSv3，在 HPDv2 上達到 85.6% 和在 HPDv3 上達到 77.6%。當生成骨幹被凍結時，輕量級的學習頭仍然能從其表示中提取有意義的偏好預測。深入探查進一步顯示，下游獎勵表現最強的層次在中後層，並且從不同階段的表示結合中受益。我們還觀察到生成骨幹容量與獎勵表現之間的一致正向擴展。最後，當用於優化 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large 與 Flow-GRPO 時，DiT-Reward 在匹配的訓練軌跡上超越 HPSv3，尤其在真實感上有明顯的增益。直接潛在評分在與 HPSv3 相當的峰值內存下也實現了 1.65 倍的推理加速。這些結果顯示，預訓練的生成 DiTs 提供了可轉移的表示，用於獎勵建模和策略優化。
2606.23626.author: Yuanming Yang et.al.
2606.23626.authors: Yuanming Yang, Guoqing Ma, Bo Wang, Yuan Zhang, Wei Tang, Chenyi Li, Haoyang Huang, Nan Duan
